chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-1553 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of main case 06-03-2025 Mr. Zia-ul-Hasan Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Amir Ali Shaikh Advocate undertakes to file vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Learned counsel for the Petitioner states that the petition is pressed to the extent that the Petitioner’s application for return of sale proceeds for auctioned goods be determined expeditiously, preferably within one month of the said application being filed, after providing an opportunity of hearing to the Petitioner. Learned counsel for the Respondent submits that they have no cavil to the aforesaid and such an application shall be decided within the aforementioned period from the time such an application is filed. It is jointly stated that in view of the aforesaid petition may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad PS
